narrative:
Precinct Ottawa Hills 3 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,213 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
